zh.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi是Gerard de Limesi和Amicia Bidun的女兒，於大約1156年出生在英國賀特福爾皮爾頓。她於1172年與William de Lindsay在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1197年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾盧福福斯享年42歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi是Gerard de Limesi和Amicia Bidun的女儿，于大约1156年出生在英国賀特福爾皮爾頓。她于1172年与William de Lindsay在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1197年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾盧福福斯享年42岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Limesi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Limés): habitational name from Limés in Oviedo province, northern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi was born about 1156, in Pirton, Hertfordshire, England as the daughter of Gerard de Limesi and Amicia Bidun. She married William de Lindsay in 1172, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1197, in Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 42, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi est née environ 1156, à Pirton, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, fille de Gerard de Limesi et Amicia Bidun. Elle a épousé William de Lindsay en 1172, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1197, à Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi wurde um 1156 in Pirton, Hertfordshire, England, als Tochter von Gerard de Limesi und Amicia Bidun geboren. Sie hat 1172 in Scotland William de Lindsay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1197 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi è nata il circa 1156 nel Pirton, Hertfordshire, England come figlia di Gerard de Limesi e Amicia Bidun. Lei sposato William de Lindsay nel 1172, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1197, nel Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesiは約1156年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアピルトンでGerard de LimesiとAmicia Bidunの娘として生まれた。1172年にスコットランドでWilliam de Lindsayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1197年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアルフネスで42歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi(은)는 대략 1156년 영국 허트퍼드실르 피르턴에서 Gerard de Limesi(와)과 Amicia Bidun의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1172년 스컷랜드에서 William de Lindsay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 루프네스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi nasceu aproximadamente 1156, em Pirton, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra filha de Gerard de Limesi e Amicia Bidun. Ela casou-se com William de Lindsay em 1172, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1197, em Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi родилась около 1156 г. в местности пиртон, хиртфордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Gerard de Limesi и Amicia Bidun. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Lindsay в 1172 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1197 г. в местности луффнесс, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Eleanor Limesi nació aproximadamente 1156, en Pirton, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra como hija de Gerard de Limesi y Amicia Bidun. Se casó con William de Lindsay en 1172, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1197, en Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
